lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Food and Drinks -- some / any (countable & uncountable)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Estephano Akihito Ishii | Aula 6 -- Food and Drinks

listenings.text: Hi, I am Lucas. Let me tell you about my kitchen. I always have some rice and some bread at home. In the morning, I eat two eggs and I drink some coffee. I do not have any juice today, so I drink water. I like vegetables, so I always buy some at the market. But I do not have any apples now. This weekend, I want to buy some fruit and cook a big meal for my friends.

Hello, my name is Mia. I want to tell you about my favorite cafe in Sao Paulo. Every morning, I order some coffee and some bread with eggs. The coffee there is very good. They do not have any juice, but they have a lot of water and tea. At lunch, I eat some rice with vegetables. I do not eat any meat, so I always choose the vegetables. The food is fresh and delicious. I am very happy when I go there.

extra_audio.text: Estephano wants to cook lunch with Sara. He looks in the kitchen. He has some rice but he does not have any eggs. He makes a shopping list. He goes to the market and buys some eggs and some juice.
